Lakeflow Jobs

Lakeflow Jobs orchestrates reliable data and analytics workflows on Databricks.

Configure tasks

Define task dependencies, retries, and clear operational ownership for each workflow.

  • Use unique task keys.
  • Confirm retry behavior.
SettingPurpose
max_retriesRetry failed tasks
 
print("run job")
